# Frenchy Surf Reports

Frenchy Review publishes current surf reports for Seaford and Middleton in South Australia.

Canonical HTML:
- https://frenchyreview.netlify.app/
- https://frenchyreview.netlify.app/middleton.html
- https://frenchyreview.netlify.app/surf-reports
- https://frenchyreview.netlify.app/surf-report/mid-coast
- https://frenchyreview.netlify.app/surf-report/south-port

JSON:
- https://frenchyreview.netlify.app/api/surf-reports/index.json
- https://frenchyreview.netlify.app/api/surf-reports/seaford.json
- https://frenchyreview.netlify.app/api/surf-reports/middleton.json

Freshness and methodology:
- https://frenchyreview.netlify.app/surf-report-data

Seaford and Middleton have spot-specific calculations. Mid Coast and South Port use the regional Mid Coast report calibrated at Seaford and must not be described as separately calibrated spot forecasts.

Every report includes issued_at, valid_until and status. Treat expired or unavailable reports accordingly.
